label: Human
description: Pause execution and wait for a human to submit a form. Uses the await_form language primitive. Form fields determine the visible inputs/outputs via form_field_specs.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Optional context shown to the reviewer alongside the form.

fields.label: Title
fields.description: Title the reviewer sees at the top of the form.

fields.label: Description
fields.placeholder: What you want the reviewer to do.

fields.label: Form fields
fields.description: Each field contributes inputs/outputs per its fieldType (see form_field_specs).

then.message: HumanQuery '{id}' has no form fields; the human would see an empty form.
